transcript.text:
I'm here for the famous donkatsu (pork cutlet)
[It's an Udon Restaurant]
Am I at the wrong place?
[You're at the right place]
[Gigantic]
It's the size of my face
[It's bigger]
I'm finished
Are you done? Yes
Hello everyone
I'm here at Mangwon-dong (neighbor in Seoul) after filming
I've been so into donkatsu lately (pork cutlet)
I'm here for the famous donkatsu
But it looks like a famous udon restaurant
Am I at the wrong place?
[Mangwon-dong Instant Noodles & Donkatsu]

[A must-visit place for the locals]
They only have about 4 items on the menu
2 of them are udon If I order fishcake udon, then I pretty much get everything
Should I get that?
Let's just get everything on the menu
How many tonkatsu?
Hard to decide Their portion is pretty big
So let's do 4 for now
1 fishcake udon, 1 instant udon, and 1 fishcake soup
4 orders of donkatsu
4? You want 4?
Okay I got you
Are you eating all of that? Yes
They gave me 2 sets
I'm starving
[Voice activated]

Thank you
That's so big, I don't think everything will fit on this table
Thank you
There's no space
[Everything is here] [She asked for no crown daisy (vegetable) in her soup]
That fits
That's a lot of food
Am I doing a food challenge?
Donkatsu is huge
It's the size of my face
There's a lot of noodles
Amazing
The soup is pretty chilly
A very traditional taste
A little bit of spicy chili sauce
This one's the fishcake udon

It's kind of like the street-udon
Perfect for a post-hangover meal
Their portion is about 2 times as much as regular places
Now for some donkatsu I've been really into these
The thick ones are pretty common It's been while since I had the original one
Bon appetit
[Escape]
[How dare you]
[I'll let you go]
The sauce is amazing
That tastes so good
The meat itself is good too, but the sauce is everything
How do I explain this? It's pretty unique
The sauce
I really want to take some of this sauce back home
Delicious

It's not too special, but
A really savory flavor that we're used to from the street foods
It's very thin
But it's bigger than my face
1/4th of it is a regular serving size
I don't think the ladies will be able to finish this whole plate
[Says the lady]
Look at the amount
It's a little bland compared to the fishcake udon
Fishcake brings a lot of flavor to it
With some donkatsu
Will it go well together?
[Curiosity killed the cat]
Can't go wrong
This is the gigantic pork cutlet
I found it

This is 1 strip
It was longer, but it got cut
This place is usually open for 24 hours,
But they close at 10pm now because of covid
They have lots of drink selections
This place seems like a good place to come after a night out
For some more food or alcohol
1 more donkatsu
Let's cut it up nicely
I'm good at it
This knife is pretty dull (excuses)
That's good enough, right?
[A mess]
My clothes are always eating the food with me
I had donkatsu yesterday, the day before, and the day before that
How is it so good?

[2 down]
[3 down]
There's rice and salad left on these plates
I don't really eat salad
I like meat, not rice
So I'll just to-go the rice to eat it with ramyun noodles later
Last piece
That's too big
The size of my face Still smaller than the ones I already ate
Am I covered?
[As a whole]
Let's just cut it up
You're so good at eating
Really? Thank you
Am I already finished?
Where did everything go?

[Into your mouth]
This has been sitting here for a while and the noodles are not bloated
Just a little bit, not too much
Let's cut it in half
It tastes better in big pieces
I remember now
I wasn't this into donkatsu, but it all started after I had that pork cutlet at Chungjeong-ro
Was it that tasty?
It made me crave more donkatsu
So I've been eating it almost every day
I like the thick donkatsu too, but
These original ones are the way to go
It's all gone
[Cleared]
Are you done? Yes I am
[I knew you could do it]

Thanks everyone
I'm going to eat some more donkatsu tomorrow
Here's the rice
[Dessert] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
